steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
Let $p$ be the price per shirt. Total before coupon $= 9p$. After the $\$54$ coupon, the cost is $\$108$:

$$9p - 54 = 108$$

steps.title: Solve for p
steps.content:
$$9p = 108 + 54 = 162 \;\Rightarrow\; p = \frac{162}{9} = 18$$

The original price per shirt was $\$18$.

The answer is 18.
